标题: Electric Foot Massager Air Compression Therapy Device for Circulation & Pain Relief Ankle Massager Acupoint Massage Relax Muscle Relieve Foot Numbness and Stiffness
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Features: 1. This air compression therapy device features dynamic airbag wrapping and 3 compression intensity levels, delivering a customizable massage that helps relieve foot fatigue and improve circulation. 2. Unlike fully enclosed boots, our portable foot massager adopts a semi-wrap design that keeps your feet ventilated while mimicking the feel of a professional hand-kneading massage for a more natural relaxation experience. 3. Equipped with acupoint massage nodes and 2 adjustable height settings, this cordless foot massager precisely targets pressure points to enhance massage intensity and stimulate blood circulation. 4. Designed for convenience, this foot massage device fits seamlessly on both left and right feet without needing to distinguish between sides. 5. Powered by a high-capacity 2000mAh battery, this foot protector delivers long-lasting use, supporting 10 to 14 massage sessions on a single charge for reliable home or travel use. Features:



1. This air compression therapy device features dynamic airbag wrapping and 3 compression intensity levels, delivering a customizable massage that helps relieve foot fatigue and improve circulation.



2. Unlike fully enclosed boots, our portable foot massager adopts a semi-wrap design that keeps your feet ventilated while mimicking the feel of a professional hand-kneading massage for a more natural relaxation experience.



3. Equipped with acupoint massage nodes and 2 adjustable height settings, this cordless foot massager precisely targets pressure points to enhance massage intensity and stimulate blood circulation.



4. Designed for convenience, this foot massage device fits seamlessly on both left and right feet without needing to distinguish between sides.



5. Powered by a high-capacity 2000mAh battery, this foot protector delivers long-lasting use, supporting 10 to 14 massage sessions on a single charge for reliable home or travel use.





Specifications:



Product Name: Foot Massager



Model Number: D220C



Material: Chinlon



Color: Black



Air Pressure: Maximum 60.0 KPa (±10%)



Speed Settings: Three levels



Rated Power: 5.0W



Rated Voltage: 5.0V 1A



Battery Model: 103450 Lithium Battery



Battery Capacity: 2000mAh



Charging Time: 2.5-3.0 hours



Usage Time on Full Charge: 14 use times*15 minutes (After 8 use times, air pressure decreases and massage intensity may diminish)



Charging Port: Type-C



Charging Indicator: Red light is on during charging, green light is on when fully charged



Can it be turned on while charging: No





Packing List:



1*Foot Massager



1*Acupoint Pressure Accessory



1*Type-C Charging Cable (30cm)



1*Instruction Manual (English + Japanese)

  • Massage Feet, Ankles & Calves,relax whole body, Comfier feet massager machine comes with shiatsu, compression, vibration and heat functions provide you with an optimal comprehensive massage experiences.

  • Adjustable support bar & Easy to Clean, Pull up the support bar at the bottom of the foot massager to get a comfortable massage angle of 20degree inclined. This foot and calf massager with heat and compression comes with removable and washable foot covers that are easy to keep clean for healthy use by family members.
  • Fit feet size up to 13, With its enlarged foot rooms, the foot massager with heat can accommodate most foot sizes, up to men size 13. Automatically shuts off after 15 minutes. Ideal mother’s day gifts or father’s day gifts for Mom, Dad, Men, Women.

Features:

1. The 3D foot massager pad features 6 massage modes， providing a customized massage experience to satisfy the diverse needs of each user.

2. This foldable calf massager mat recommends a 20-minute daily session to help reduce edema and the look of fatty legs. It has a usage time of up to 20 hours.

4. The foot stimulator incorporates EMS pulse massage technology, aimed at slimming and shaping the legs.

6. With its 3D ergonomic design, the foot pad offers a more humanized massage experience compared to flat-designed massage pads, cradling the feet gently for maximum comfort.

Fast Heating for Cozy Comfort The upgraded Snailax foot massager heats up quickly, reaching temperatures up to 131°F. It's an ideal solution for warming cold, stiff feet during winter months. With high and low heat settings, you can choose your preferred level of warmth. The heating function operates independently, allowing you to enjoy heat therapy without massage if desired. Relieve Foot Pain and Stress Equipped with innovative shiatsu rollers, this massager delivers deep kneading and rolling massage to soothe sore feet. It targets deep nerves, joints, and acupuncture points to alleviate discomfort from conditions like plantar fasciitis and neuropathy. Adjustable Compression Massage The foot massager offers three levels of compression massage on the instep, heel, and ankles. When combined with kneading and heat functions, it enhances relaxation and eases foot pain. For first-time users, starting with a low intensity is recommended to ensure comfort. Invigorating Vibration Massage An additional vibrating massage focuses on the toes, providing comprehensive foot pampering. With three vibration speeds, you can customize your massage experience. Easily turn on/off or adjust settings for a convenient foot massage at home or in the office. Easy to Clean and Perfect for Gifting The detachable foot sleeves are machine washable, keeping the massager clean and hygienic. It accommodates foot sizes up to 13, making it suitable for most users. This foot massager makes an excellent gift for birthdays, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas. The included home adapter is compatible with 100~240V power outlets for safe use."}]

2 Heating Levels-Foot Massager with Heat

Kneading & Compression & Vibration

Remote Control-Easy to Use

Washable Inserts

Gift Choice

Snailax Foot Massager Mode 527, designed to provide therapeutic relief for tired, aching feet.

Fast Heating for Cozy Comfort

The upgraded Snailax foot massager heats up quickly, reaching temperatures up to 131°F. It's an ideal solution for warming cold, stiff feet during winter months. With high and low heat settings, you can choose your preferred level of warmth. The heating function operates independently, allowing you to enjoy heat therapy without massage if desired.

Relieve Foot Pain and Stress

Equipped with innovative shiatsu rollers, this massager delivers deep kneading and rolling massage to soothe sore feet. It targets deep nerves, joints, and acupuncture points to alleviate discomfort from conditions like plantar fasciitis and neuropathy.

Adjustable Compression Massage

The foot massager offers three levels of compression massage on the instep, heel, and ankles. When combined with kneading and heat functions, it enhances relaxation and eases foot pain. For first-time users, starting with a low intensity is recommended to ensure comfort.

Invigorating Vibration Massage

An additional vibrating massage focuses on the toes, providing comprehensive foot pampering. With three vibration speeds, you can customize your massage experience. Easily turn on/off or adjust settings for a convenient foot massage at home or in the office.

Easy to Clean and Perfect for Gifting

The detachable foot sleeves are machine washable, keeping the massager clean and hygienic. It accommodates foot sizes up to 13, making it suitable for most users. This foot massager makes an excellent gift for birthdays, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas. The included home adapter is compatible with 100~240V power outlets for safe use.

1. Hot compress massage combined with air pressure kneading can relieve muscle tension and promote the relaxation of legs.


2. Pneumatic massager: 360° airbag wrapped massage, simulating manual manipulation, including pushing, kneading, kneading, pressing, etc., effectively relieve leg pressure.


3. Progressive kneading: The device adopts three-dimensional circulation extrusion to deeply relieve lower limb pressure, promote vein patency and relieve venous abnormalities.


4. Wireless design: Wireless design, convenient and portable, intelligent controller, easy to use control, including one-click start, intelligent timing, mode and intensity adjustment.


5. 3 kinds of massage intensity, 3 kinds of massage modes, 3 speed constant temperature treatment: 40°C, 50°C, 60°C three temperature Settings, enjoy warm and comfortable, relieve joint discomfort.


6. Lightweight and breathable design for all seasons, adjustable Velcro patches ensure safety and fit.


Say goodbye to leg pain and discomfort with our air wave leg massager. Whether you're standing for long periods of time, exercising, or experiencing cold legs and feet, this device offers the ultimate solution for leg relief. Experience the benefits of hot compress massage, air pressure techniques, and customizable Settings for a truly rejuvenating massage experience.

Description:

Target ankle pain effectively with this portable foot massager. Its three heat settings (48°C, 53°C, 58°C) deliver therapeutic warmth for maximum comfort and relaxation.

Choose from three rechargeable massage intensities: First level (daily care), Second level(sports recovery), and Third level (ankle discomfort relief) – tailored to your needs for a personalized experience.

The heated ankle wrap features a 15-minute auto shut-off timer, preventing overuse and ensuring safe, worry-free sessions.

Enjoy effortless, cordless control thanks to an intuitive touchscreen interface. The LED display of this ankle massager shows the heating temperature and vibration level in real time.

Adjustable straps securely fit the heated wrap on either foot, providing reliable ankle support for both left and right users.


Specification:

Main material--Main material: OK elastic cloth

Other material: Neoprene plus 3% composite cloth

Lining: Fleece

Rated voltage: 3.7V

Rated power: 7.5W

Input voltage: 5V

Colour: Black

Number of vibration motors: 1pc

Battery type: lithium polymer battery (independent one)

Battery capacity: 2000mAh

Charging time: 2 hours

Fully charged using time: more than 1 hour (4-5 times)

Charging status: White light flashes while charging; Fully charged, white light is always on.

Can not be turned on while charging.


Package：

1* English Colour Box

2* Cordless Ankle Massager

1* Instruction Manual

2* Type-C Charging Cable (80cm length)
